description_long: This is a medium-sized rectangular cardboard parcel, commonly used for shipping and storage in urban environments. The box is constructed from corrugated brown cardboard, with a visible seam of packing tape running along the top. On two of its sides, there are printed handling symbols, including 'this side up', 'fragile', and 'recyclable', indicating care instructions for transport and disposal. The surface of the box shows subtle vertical corrugation lines and some light wear or smudging near the base, suggesting it has been handled or stored on the ground. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with no branding or decorative elements, making it suitable for generic parcel delivery. The box is fully closed and appears to be empty or filled with lightweight contents.
description: A medium-sized, brown corrugated cardboard box with packing tape on top and handling symbols printed on two sides. The surface is matte with visible wear and no branding.
description_view_0: The end of the box with handling symbols and a visible tape seam on top.
description_view_1: A plain long side of the box with no markings, showing the corrugated texture.
description_view_2: The opposite end of the box, also with handling symbols and the tape seam visible.
description_view_3: The other long side of the box, featuring handling symbols in the lower left corner.
